title: Farmer GUI
description: Reimagined Interface for a real farmer! ❗️❗️Over 190 supported mods ❗️❗️
body:
# [We also on Curseforge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmergui)

![border down](https://i.imgur.com/pUaDcvI.png)

# 📋 ABOUT:

🔥**Farmer GUI is far more than just a texture replacement for the game — it’s over 500 hours of dedicated work, emotions, memories, and the desire to give people something warm and cozy, something that touches the soul**

💛**Redesigned interface in tones of wheat fields. Hopefully it will have some fans. The whole interface and some effects have been changed for now. Feel free to use it in your builds, but follow all license rules. Hope you enjoy it)**

# 🌾 Features

>   ✨ Completely Redrawn Interface
> The entire vanilla interface has been redesigned — 
> including icons, effects, and all UI screens
> 
>   🌾 Golden Wheat Aesthetic
> Wheat textures have been recolored into a warm golden tone 
> to emphasize the value of the harvest
> 
>   🔧 Wide Mod Support
> Supports over 190 mods (full list provided below)
> 
>   💬 New Splash Texts
> 38 new splash texts reflecting the cozy spirit of the pack
> 
>   📜 Enhanced Tooltips
> New tooltips for a more polished and immersive experience
> 
![border up](https://i.imgur.com/WBK6nLX.png)

</details>

# FUTURE PLANS:


### 🤩 In progress:
> 1. Add 200+ supported mods - Currently 197/200 🕒

### 👇 Implemented ideas:
> 1. Add a texture of block thumbnail to the gui of each supported mod(✅) 
> 2. Support for all [Let's Do] mods (✅) 
> 3. Addon support for Farmers delight (✅) 
> 4. Update and port texture pack to version 1.20.2, 1.21+ (✅)
> 5. Add 50+ supported mods (197/52) (✅)
> 6. Add 100+ supported mods (197/100) (✅)
> 7. Bring the newest version of pack to version 1.18-19 (✅)
   
🚀 Just ideas:

> 1. Bring the texture pack to version 1.16.5

![border up](https://i.imgur.com/WBK6nLX.png)

You can buy me a coffee here: Ko-fi.com/matikk And also you can always offer your ideas!

You can use it in your own mod packs

My DISCORD server:
https://discord.gg/xNK3FZejEm
